section.data-narration: Data security and privacy are critical components of information technology.

div.p: Data security and privacy are critical components of information technology. With the increasing reliance on digital technologies, protecting sensitive information from unauthorized access, use, disclosure, modification, or destruction has become a pressing concern.

section.data-narration: Data security and privacy have several definitions that are essential to understanding their concepts.

div.p: Data security is the practice of protecting information from unauthorized access, use, disclosure, modification, or destruction.
Data privacy is the right to control who has access to personal information and how it is used.
Confidentiality is the practice of maintaining the secrecy of information.
Integrity is the practice of ensuring that data is accurate and not altered without authorization.

section.data-narration: There are several types of data security threats that can compromise the security of digital information.

div.p: Malware is software that is designed to harm or exploit a computer system.
A virus is a type of malware that replicates itself and spreads to other systems.
A worm is a type of malware that infects a computer system and replicates itself without the need for user interaction.
Spyware is software that is designed to spy on a user's activities without their consent.
Adware is software that is designed to display unwanted advertisements.

section.data-narration: There are several data security measures that can be taken to protect digital information.

div.p: Encryption is the practice of converting data into a code to protect it from unauthorized access.
Firewalls are network security systems that monitor and control incoming and outgoing network traffic based on predetermined security rules.
Intrusion Detection Systems are systems that monitor network traffic for signs of unauthorized access or malicious activity.
Access Control is the practice of controlling who has access to data and systems.

section.data-narration: There are several data privacy laws that are essential to protecting the rights of individuals.

div.p: General Data Protection Requirements are essential to protecting the rights of individuals.
